name: V-mon

signature_move.name: Bunbun Punch
signature_move.description: Swings both of its arms in circles, striking the opponent.

description: A new species of Digimon that was discovered recently. As a survivor of a species that flourished in the Genesis of the Digital World, it is able to perform "Armor evolution", a "pseudo-evolution" using the Digimentals . Among others, V-mon is an excellent Combat Species , as it possesses hidden power, and demonstrates tremendous abilities by Armor evolving. Although it has a mischievous, prank-loving personality, it has another side with a strong sense of justice. Its Signature Move is swinging both of its arms in circles, striking the opponent ( Bunbun Punch ). Its Special Move is knocking down the opponent with an intense headbutt ( V-mon Head ).
